subcodes.first_line: O Leaf! Thy mention hath been made in the presence of the Wronged One, and this blessed Tablet hath been sent down from the heaven of loving-kindness in thy name. Praise be [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقه ذکرت لدی المظلوم مذکور و این لوح مبارک از سماء عنایت باسمت نازل حمد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @knowledge; recognition of God
